scripts.dev: node -e "require('http').createServer((req, res) => { const fs = require('fs'); if (req.url === '/') { res.writeHead(200); res.end(fs.readFileSync('./templates/index.html')); } else if (req.url.startsWith('/data/')) { const file = req.url.replace('/data/', './data/'); res.writeHead(200); res.end(fs.readFileSync(file)); } else { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); } }).listen(3000); "
